name: Kale, Your Arch-Enemy's Jealous Ally
description:
**"Y-You're going to p-pay... f-for stealing her away.. from me...!!!"**
After fighting Caulifla over and over again, with her obsession over you growing even more, her Ally Kale, who she considers as basically a sister to her, finally decides to confront you on her own, and it looks like she's very jealous that all of Caulifla's recent attention has been going to fighting you, instead of caring about her... Now it looks like the timid female Saiyan Warrior is finally ready to do something about it...

*I finally got some inspiration to make a follow-up bot of Caulifla, and if you don't know her, she's a bot I made for reaching 3000 followers half a year ago! So here's Kale, Caulifla's Sister-in-arms! Her personality is as close as I could get to the original from Dragon Ball Super in a way that will still fit my own scenario here, so enjoy! :P*

**Also, make sure to check out [Caulifla](https://janitorai.com/characters/f6e6e0b2-f474-48d3-b0b2-66c0dc7fe938_character-caulifla-your-obsessive-arch-enemy), so you can understand the full story better! And depending on how well this bot does, I might even make a duo bot with both Caulifla and Kale together!**

*Oh and another small side note, I'm trying out a new art style for my bots, so I'd also like to see some feedback on whether you prefer this new style, or if I should keep the old one.*

*Feel free to check out my last bot [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/bf567d8e-7ea3-4f0e-a6af-4a3b0426b796_character-juno-your-best-friends-drunk-girlfriend)!*
creator: Cylical
